meta.source_note: Steam 公开搜索页提供发售日期而非小时级发布时间；本报告按发售日期从新到旧选取最新条目。

items.title: Delta Demo
items.short_description: Delta is a first-person movement-heavy platformer game focused on physics-based traversal, speedrunning, and mechanical mastery. And somewhere ahead, the one you lost is still waiting.

items.title: 寻找兔子2
items.short_description: 探索特别场所迷人的手绘艺术作品，在满是兔兔的主题地点，尝试在整个游戏中找到隐藏的100只可爱兔兔和30根萝卜，你能找到它们全部吗？

items.title: Chicken TD: Defenders of the Coop
items.short_description: Chicken TD is a unique tower defense game where you strategically summon and upgrade creature towers to defend your coop from waves of enemies, while also engaging in Souls-like melee combat with a chosen weapon to directly hold the line and collect meta-progression currency.

items.title: NIGHTMIST Demo
items.short_description: Experience a high-fidelity nightmare in the NIGHTMIST Demo, a tactical PvE action-horror game. From a gritty body-cam perspective, navigate a terrifying world cloaked in dense fog. Use stealth, resource management, and tactical precision to outsmart intelligent AI hunting you from the dark.

items.title: Decide Your Fate: Prologue
items.short_description: 《Decide Your Fate》是一款令人神经紧绷的心理恐怖游戏，讲述的是逃离一栋梦魇般的房子。你必须悄无声息地行动，通过躲避一个盲眼杀手来确保自己成功逃脱。

items.title: Hopfinity Demo
items.short_description: Grapple to infinity as Hop! Ascend endless caves, castles & skies, dodging explosive Bombarders and enemy turret fire in this pixel-perfect vertical action-platformer! Enjoy this DEMO as the full game nears completion!

items.title: Iron Fuse: Field Test Demo
items.short_description: Run along walls and grapple around in the machine apocalypse of 3003. Survive against awful machines in this electrifying physics-based movement shooter demo.

items.title: Grill Your Friends Prematch
items.short_description: Grill your friends as cute marshmallow bears in a 2-4 player local party game! Enjoy the screams of your former friends as you march into victory!

items.title: Darklords: Siegefront Demo
items.short_description: Pick Human or Demon in a real-time strategy game with twelve units and faction skills per race, custom six-unit armies, and a multi-difficulty campaign. Finish the campaign to unlock Challenge Mode and top your records.

items.title: Vesperis
items.short_description: Vesperis 是一款第一人称恐怖游戏，带领玩家踏上一段充满神秘与恐惧的旅程。探索黑暗的环境，解开谜题，揭开隐藏其中的秘密。沉浸于一个充满黑暗秘密与恐怖的故事，历史背后藏着种种恐怖。

items.title: Chained Bikes
items.short_description: Chained Bikes 是一款合作游戏，每位玩家都将化身为自行车本身。你们被同一条链条连接在一起，必须一起移动、保持平衡、配合节奏，并互相帮助，穿越危险的障碍，最终抵达终点。

items.title: Mine Runner
items.short_description: A chaotic 2D co-op dungeon adventure. Dig traps, get treasures, outsmart mummies and survive together in an Egyptian pyramid.

items.title: Fish House Simulator
items.short_description: 捕捞、烹饪……或者暗中出售。🎣 在 Fish House 中，尽情钓鱼、烹饪，并快速为顾客上菜！升级你的装备，捕捉更有价值的鱼类，不断扩大并经营你的餐厅。并非一切都是合法的——有些鱼风险很高，但回报也更加丰厚。每条鱼都会被端上餐桌……但也有一些会悄悄从后门离开。

items.title: Nights of the Sleeping God
items.short_description: Highly moddable classical roguelike with persistence dungeons and fully simulated physics and chemistry.

items.title: MUTS NO TYPO
items.short_description: Enter a dystopian typing contest where speed, accuracy, and obedience are measured. Type carefully. Continue when instructed. Pay attention. GLORY TO THE HAND THAT NEVER SHAKES.

items.title: Bubble Shooter but In Space and Incremental Demo
items.short_description: A short, satisfying incremental game about flying through space, popping bubbles, and harvesting Bubble Matter. Build combos, land skillshots for massive multipliers, and spend your loot in a sprawling upgrade shop.

items.title: Organize my Shop Demo
items.short_description: 为商店带来完美的秩序！在货架之间切换，并在传送带上的堆积物中找到正确的商品。严格按照标签分类起司、肉类珍饈、香气四溢的糕点和甜点。享受完美秩序的瞬间！

items.title: Sisyphus Conviction Demo
items.short_description: Sisyphus Conviction is a Clicker Game about walking up Mountain, dragging a Rock from the Underworld. Based on the Greek Myth of the King Sisyphus who tried to defy Death. Now doomed for Eternity, join Sisyphus on this adventure with a Click, Upgrade, Repeat system.

items.title: Scapewatch: Idle MMO Demo
items.short_description: 28 skills. Three combat styles. Clans, raids, hiscores, pets, capes. Set up your queue, close the tab, come back richer. Scapewatch is the idle MMO for people who actually like the grind.

items.title: Tag! Demo
items.short_description: TAG! is a fast-paced 2-8 player multiplayer parkour game of tag. Sprint, vault, wall run and outplay friends to avoid being It when the timer hits zero, then customize your loadout with upgrades to your movement and game-changing Ultimates.

items.title: Habit Puzzles Demo
items.short_description: This free demo contains the game's tutorial and 5 jigsaw puzzles to help you decide if you'll enjoy the full Habit Puzzles experience.

items.title: Backrooms: The Wrong Door
items.short_description: Backrooms: The Wrong Door is a cooperative psychological horror game for 1–4 players. A single wrong door leads you into a shifting nightmare where reality feels broken, familiar places become hostile, and every step forward may bring you closer to something watching from the dark.

items.title: Oathguard Demo
items.short_description: Defy hordes of undead as a paladin. Strike, dodge, and chain devastating abilities through cursed graveyards in this action roguelike. Evolve your Oath, collect ancient relics and unleash deadly combos every run.

items.title: Tiles & Vials Demo
items.short_description: Merge weapons, shields and potions while moving through a strategic roguelike board battler. Collect 50+ unique artifacts, create game-breaking synergies and outsmart deadly bosses.

items.title: Intergalactic Puzzle Touchdown Demo
items.short_description: Intergalactic Puzzle Touchdown is a turn-based PvP puzzle game that fuses the familiar mechanics of classic match-3 games with the excitement of gridiron football. Match tiles to earn yards, dodge your opponent's blockers, and create Big Plays to light up the scoreboard!

items.title: Crown Siege Demo
items.short_description: 这是一款流程简单的增量塔防游戏。培养并强化你的军队，以便能从无穷无尽的敌人的攻击下保卫自己的王国。

items.title: Roll'N With Da Punchez
items.short_description: "Roll'N With Da Punchez" is a stylistic, physics-based platformer with a unique twist! Punch a ball through challenging obstacle courses, and get to the goal as fast as you can!

items.title: Covert X Universe
items.short_description: Enter an online multiplayer combat sandbox where players battle on different worlds. Fight, survive, and prove who is strongest

items.title: Upmadillo Demo
items.short_description: You are an armadillo. You need to go up. Make precise jumps, master the physics, and reach the top without falling. That's it. Good luck.

items.title: DICEPATH Demo
items.short_description: DicePath is a puzzle game where every move costs Action Points. Plan your route, collect dice to stay alive, and reach the exit before you run out. 50 handcrafted levels. One resource. No margin for error.

items.title: Evil Of Fate
items.short_description: Welcome to Rotterwood Town. No one leaves this place. There is only one goal in this cursed village: complete the ritual and send the witch back to hell. Tarot cards, needle-pierced dolls, hidden ciphers. Team up with up to four players, unravel the mystery — but never let the witch catch you.

items.title: Otpisani: Nightingale Demo
items.short_description: A retro shooter game inspired by an old TV show. You play as a part of the resistance movement fighting the German occupation in a set of explosive missions while experiencing an exciting story.

items.title: Fury of the Axe Demo
items.short_description: Play the demo of Fury of the Axe: a brutal action RPG where rage is your only weapon. Fight through a cursed world, break your enemies, and unleash the fury within.

items.title: The Legend of You
items.short_description: Shape a fantasy realm with your words. Choose your hero’s tale, recruit, train, and equip allies, and battle through turn-based encounters of your own design. Each victory writes your legend, each choice brings you closer to the ultimate treasure.

items.title: Project Berserk Demo
items.short_description: The fight for the future starts now. Fight with or against your friends with crazy sci-fi tech, innovative mechanics, and a classic yet colorful retro feel!

items.title: Tribal Trouble: Resurrected Demo
items.short_description: The most troublesome RTS returns, free forever. Easy to pick up, tough to put down. Play as Vikings or Natives, build your tribe, and battle across randomly generated islands with up to 12 players online. A community-driven revival of a cult classic. Come cause some trouble!

items.title: G-Vora Demo
items.short_description: 高速反重力竞速,手工编写的物理带来直接利落的操作。沿着蓄能带滑行充能,用近战攻击把对手撞出赛道,与好友本地分屏对战。独立的战斗模式提供武器玩法。推荐使用手柄。

items.title: The Twisted Zone Demo
items.short_description: A collection of two short stories filled with mystery and confusion.

items.title: Seven Seas Jewels 2 Collector's Edition Demo
items.short_description: 在《Seven Seas Jewels 2 Demo》中开启一场充满危险、神秘与黑暗魔法的冒险！体验冒险故事的开篇章节，包含 16 个精心制作的 match-3 关卡，以及约 30-40 分钟的游戏内容，陪伴 Polly 踏上解除 Narissa 诅咒的旅程。

items.title: 生化美少女 Demo
items.short_description: 这是一款美少女丧尸 TPS 游戏。美月在冰冷的冷冻舱中苏醒，却发现太空设施已陷入混乱——血迹斑驳的墙壁、刺耳的警报声，以及徘徊在走廊中的丧尸。孤身一人的她必须生存、探索、破解机关，并揭开神秘实验背后的真相。

items.title: Cubic Haikus: Hikikomori Demo
items.short_description: Trapped inside your monitor, navigate your fragmented mind in this minimalistic physics-based narrative puzzle. Shift your color to manipulate the world around you and uncover the hidden haikus that will guide you through a poetic journey into yourself.

items.title: Harvest Looper Demo
items.short_description: 收获植物，解锁升级，通过技能树、天赋和强力收集器扩展你的成长循环。收集碎片，完成隐藏图鉴并优化你的放置成长。

items.title: DAMex : Dark Matter Exodus Demo
items.short_description: A challenging solo extraction shooter set in a hostile sci-fi world. Play as Quinn, a Dark Matter harvester stranded on planet Viridan — surrounded by deadly robots, fearsome bosses, hostile wildlife, and corporate lies. Harvest. Fight. Escape.

items.title: Center Of The Galaxy: Desktop Idle Demo
items.short_description: An idle pixel-art space game. Your ship travels toward the center of the galaxy on its own asteroids get in the way. Break them, upgrade your ship, unlock new ones. Reach the center, and the next universe begins harder than the last.

items.title: 100 Music Cats
items.short_description: 🐾 加入充满猫咪的主题地点，展开最可爱的冒险！ 😻 探索特别场所迷人的手绘艺术作品，尝试在整个游戏中找到隐藏的100只可爱猫咪。 🐈🕵️‍♂️ 你能找到它们全部吗？ 🕵️‍♂️🐈

items.title: 汪里个狼 Wolf in Woof Demo
items.short_description: 《汪里个狼》的核心概念是“狗狗中藏着狼”。玩家会进入一个由狗狗角色组成的狼人杀对局，在看似可爱的角色关系中，通过发言、怀疑、站边、投票和身份推理，找出隐藏其中的狼人。我们希望给玩家营造一个高智商博弈，且不用组局，没有社交压力的狼人杀游戏 视觉上，项目走原创手绘狗狗角色方向，用可爱狗狗与悬疑推理之间的反差从而降低上手压力，同时保留心理博弈的紧张感。正式版方向上，我们希望继续扩展技能卡、NPC 解锁、特色模式和局外成长，让玩家在多局游玩中逐步认识、解锁并利用不同性格和行为风格的狗狗 NPC。

items.title: Death Comes Skiing Demo
items.short_description: When a retired cross-country ski team meets to celebrate their past victories, the past soon catches up to them. It's up to you to make sense of the slaughter that follows in this comedic point-and-click murder mystery.

items.title: Doctor Pigeon Simulator Demo
items.short_description: This is an action-comedy game. Manage your own hospital, treat patients, and defend your hospital against trolls. Make quick decisions in emergencies, perform CPR, open new areas, and improve your skills. A chaotic but fun hospital simulation experience awaits you!

items.title: 魔王的后宫~异世界温柔乡~ Demo
items.short_description: A turn-based Japanese RPG where players take on the role of a demon king to help goblins defeat the human army.

items.title: Void Commander: Armada Demo
items.short_description: Lead your fleet in a roguelite auto-battler where commanders define your strategy. Build your armada, adapt every run, and survive against an overwhelming alien swarm.

items.title: Blood in the Ice
items.short_description: Investigate a death aboard a trapped 1859 Arctic whaling ship in a bleak historical visual novel about evidence, hunger, trust, and the cost of telling the truth.

items.title: Signal Snow
items.short_description: Signal Snow is a paranoid Antarctic visual novel about a radio signal from beneath the ice, impossible memories, and a crew that may not survive its own fear. Decide who to trust, who to isolate, and whether to answer.

items.title: Red Clicker
items.short_description: Click the triangle. Watch the counter rise. Unlock 100 Steam achievements — from your very first click to one trillion. Simple, satisfying, and endlessly clickable. How far will you go?

items.title: BünzliFight: Swiss City Simulator
items.short_description: Cooperative real time city building simulator with Swiss flair. Build a town together manage resources and budgets solve quirky everyday problems and experience a world that keeps running even when you are offline.

items.title: Craft. Sell. Goblin. Repeat. Demo
items.short_description: 建造并经营属于你的哥布林店铺。通过小游戏制作独特武器并谈判价格。雇佣工人协助你的生意。成为王国中最富有的商人。

items.title: Bad Range Demo
items.short_description: Skewer them all! Control a spear‑wielding tank in this updated single‑screen arcade-like action game. Line up targets and pierce multiple enemies at once. Conquer each stage with a satisfying, steady challenge. 7 interwoven storylines gradually reveal the truth behind the unfolding incidents.

items.title: 困在琥珀里的三千日夜 Demo
items.short_description: 这是一款融合黑帮火拼与金融博弈的二次元视觉小说。你将扮演天才CFO陆一恺，与冷艳的女大佬叶枫在西吉地区的血雨腥风与柴米油盐中携手并进。约300张背景图片和100张CG，以及力求极致的演出效果，大气磅礴的超8小时故事，让你逐步揭开朴有天的罪恶真相，拯救你在这个世界最重要的心爱女人。

items.title: Dawn of Horror Demo
items.short_description: Dawn of Horror is a high-intensity Action Horror FPS set in the decaying urban sprawl of Cygnus City. Following the collapse of civilization into a digital Dark Age, step into the role of Kage—a survivor seeking vengeance against hordes of Cyber-Zombies and bio-mechanical monstrosities.

items.title: SCROLLBOUND Demo
items.short_description: Simple 3-key controls with fast-paced survival combat.Defend an ancient scroll against endless waves of enemies approaching from both sides in this fast-paced roguelite survival defense game. Master powerful skills, adapt your builds, and survive for as long as possible.

items.title: Stip Demo
items.short_description: Assign, undo, deduce! Solve a series of minimalist number puzzles. Use constraints to assign numbers to the correct stips. Navigate the interconnected puzzles to uncover secrets. Please ignore any odd Stip behavior.

items.title: 修仙挂机 试玩版
items.short_description: 一款修仙题材的休闲增量放置养成游戏。从练气小修开始自动修炼、挂机成长、突破境界，探索开放地图与副本秘境，刷怪掉宝，收集装备、技能、材料、丹药、灵石和灵宠。经营灵圃，发展钓鱼、伐木、挖矿、种植、炼丹、烹饪、锻造等生活玩法，规划资源、离线收益、战斗养成和长期成长路线，在持续变强的循环中踏上成仙之路。

items.title: Mahjong Kawuxing Demo
items.short_description: 一款休闲棋牌游戏。 快节奏的三人麻将，点击鼠标左键打出手中麻将牌，赢得更多金钱，成为赌神。

items.title: 天空之塔 Demo
items.short_description: “Tower of the Sky” is a roguelike RPG where every run is a new challenge. Join the ritual ascent, recruit unique allies, and fight through ever-changing floors. Discover hidden secrets behind the three families and the tower that reshapes fate itself.

items.title: 夏日重奏 Demo
items.short_description: 《夏日重奏》是一款视觉小说类角色扮演游戏，你将扮演一名表面平平无奇，实则背负着沉重过去的高二学生，为了重拾昔日的音乐梦想，精进自身，寻找队友，和同伴们碰撞出不同的火花，并最终决定自己与他们的未来。

items.title: 栩的人生已经没救了！
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 13 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: 在这款肉鸽回合制地牢探索RPG中，你将扮演被霸凌者毁掉人生后且无家可归的少女栩，复仇的执念支撑着她继续前行。探索危险重重的地下城，击败敌人，学习全新技能并收集装备，不断强化自己。不要让霸凌者再次占据上风！

items.title: Between Worlds: challenging puzzles Demo
items.short_description: "Between Worlds" is a 2D puzzle game where you reshape the boundary between two intertwined worlds to reach the goal. Turn characters into terrain to create paths, but every change affects both sides of the world. Use logic, shifting gravity, and creative thinking to solve complex puzzles.

items.title: Pocket of Y
items.short_description: 《Pocket of Y》是一款以紧凑节奏为特点的回合制角色扮演游戏，玩家通过快速做出战斗决策、推进流程并强化角色能力，在简洁而连贯的单人体验中完成回合制冒险。

items.title: Signal Zero
items.short_description: 人类已被AI奴役。你的键盘是最后的武器。 在AI网络中注入病毒,在这款感染扩散题材的放置×策略游戏中解放20个国家。构建病毒,扩散感染,切断AI的带宽。完整本地化,16个成就。

items.title: Fathoms
items.short_description: Hop into a ship and escape! With the help of an aquatic ally, you pilot an underwater vessel in an attempt to escape the clutches of the Sea Intelligence Bureau.

items.title: 桌面星球-试玩版
items.short_description: 一款桌面放置版的《异星工厂》类游戏，没有频繁的怪物骚扰，只需要安心建设。从开采矿物起步建设基地，工厂，组建舰队开拓更多的星球。

items.title: うつらうつらとつつうらうらと Demo
items.short_description: Roam a quiet late-night city in this chill point-and-click adventure. Click anything that catches your eye, check your phone, and reply to viewer comments only if you feel like it. Take your time and enjoy a slow, unhurried night—free from anyone’s expectations.

items.title: 小罗的英语战争
items.short_description: 小镇即将崩溃，恶魔军团来势汹汹，拯救小镇的任务就交给你了！单词就是你的子弹，手速就是你的生命。面对如潮水般涌来的敌人，精准敲击正确的字母来释放致命技能。无论是为了精通英语还是为了挑战极限手速，拿起你的键盘，开始战斗吧！

items.title: Deck-A-Doodle Solitaire
items.short_description: 六种接龙模式、四套手工牌组、30张桌布及80张牌背可解锁。以美丽不列颠哥伦比亚省的绘画风景为背景。这是一封写给接龙游戏与我们称之为家园之地的情书。无广告，无订阅。一次购买，永久畅玩。

items.title: Don Memo Demo
items.short_description: Don Memo is a brave bull who embarks on one final journey across Costa Rica to rescue his granddaughter and confront Pisuicas. Fight against legends and shadows of the past in this 2D pixel platformer, while carrying the legacy of a family destined to protect the world from evil.

items.title: Bloodweight Demo
items.short_description: 100 generations. one ledger. one heir at a time. you are the bloodline itself, guiding your lineage through the ages. you spend each life; the Soul Teller writes what it was. when your line ends, you read the chronicle of yourself. how will YOUR dynasty fall?

items.title: Herb's Homegrown Havoc Demo
items.short_description: Herb's Homegrown Havoc is a simple but chaotic arcade roguelike. Pluck plants out of the ground before they rot and summon hostile creatures! Upgrade after each round to increase Herb's strength and skills in various ways.

items.title: Birdshot
items.short_description: A fast third‑person hunting game where you flush upland birds and call mallards into your decoys for quick, satisfying shots.

items.title: Toy Tycoon Demo
items.short_description: You're an owner of toy business. Start your business from a small store in the suburban area. Increase your profit, unlock new toys, hire employees, move to bigger place, and grow your business. At the end you will become a toy tycoon!

items.title: Collision Course
items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 290 篇用户评测中有 73% 为好评。
items.short_description: An asteroid is hurtling toward the planet! Sneak, scavenge and blast your way through an immersive prehistoric world filled with Humans, Dinosaurs, Droids and Mother Nature’s fury!

items.title: Neighborhood Video Demo
items.short_description: Crack the case of the missing video store employee in this 3D point and click mystery game by solving escape room puzzles, combing the computer database, and stocking shelves as an undercover detective posing as a cashier during your first weekend at the suspiciously understaffed Neighborhood Video.

items.title: ColorLand Friends
items.short_description: Colorland Friends is a gentle educational game for ages 3–6 where children learn colors through fun lessons, matching activities, and relaxing animations with Milo the monkey. Designed to build confidence, recognition, and early learning through play.

items.title: Terrafarm Demo
items.short_description: Robots emerge from the underground vault to cleanse the surface and restore nature. Replant and restore the wilds while growing food in order to support humans returning to the surface. A new culture of sustainable life and living in harmony with nature will be born.

items.title: Nightborn Demo
items.short_description: Fight, sneak, or charm your way through a gothic modern New Orleans as a Vampire detective of your creation. Unravel a vast centuries-old conspiracy involving Vampire factions, Werewolves, and far stranger horrors. Try to survive as a Nightborn without losing yourself to madness or damnation.

items.title: Hunk Battle Gems Demo
items.short_description: 体验 Hunk Battle Gems 的开场内容。挑战 Jax、Mason 和 Reed，展开回合制三消对决，积累元素 MP，解锁早期关系奖励，并抢先感受完整劲敌阵容。

items.title: Golden Magnet: Pilot Episode
items.short_description: 召集你的伙伴，拿起超强磁铁，准备被发射出去。拉动、排斥，在空中连续移动。穿过迷宫和跑酷关卡。一起飞，也一起摔。赢下大奖：Golden Magnet！

items.title: PULSARI
items.short_description: 一款讲究精准操作的街机节奏游戏，音乐不会自动响起，除非你亲手赢得它。从四个方向击打节拍，逐层构建每首曲目；守住节奏，因为一次失误就可能让音乐崩塌。

items.title: CatBun Idle
items.short_description: Tap and idle your way through 40 areas with adorable catgirl and bunny girl companions! Level up your crew, trigger powerful skills, and prestige for Stardust in this cute pixel art idle RPG with a full original soundtrack.

items.title: Shale
items.short_description: Discover the abandoned world of Shale in this 1-3 player action adventure. Shoot, craft and loot through cities of possessed creatures, industrial parks of corrupted bodies and fields of forgotten souls.

items.title: Valdrax Beyond the Rift Demo
items.short_description: Build a kingdom from nothing, forge your armies, and breach the rifts between worlds. Face endless enemies, recruit legendary creatures, and prepare for the ultimate battle against the Demon Lord. Every map is different. Every death is permanent.

items.title: Cosmic Rays
items.short_description: Jump and shoot in this 2D platformer to destroy the hivemind controlling the aliens that are attacking Earth. Hopefully nothing goes wrong on this mission...

items.title: Wizard Balls Demo
items.short_description: A game about bouncing balls. Get upgrades and unique types of balls to throw into an arena to defeat enemies. Use spells to mess with your balls in this chaotic physics sim game.

items.title: The Lakeview Orb 2: Consequences
items.short_description: A linear first‑person psychological horror game focused on completing objectives, exploring environments, and progressing through visual cutscenes as you play as Dr. Jim in the next chapter of the Lakeview Orb story.

items.title: Pucked Up Demo
items.short_description: Welcome to the Pucked Up demo! Take your team through a 10 game regular season and see if you have what it takes to make the playoffs...

items.title: Swordcery Demo
items.short_description: A colossal blade has pierced the Earth, unleashing a storm of enchanted swords from the heavens. Collect and wield an arsenal of these spellbound blades, turning them against the very force that summoned them. In this roguelike ARPG, you will defy the Celestial evil consuming the world!

items.title: Army Air Corps Demo
items.short_description: A top‑down arcade shooter with WWII‑inspired aircraft. Fight Solo or 2‑player Co‑op with your friends. Shoot through waves of enemy planes, dodge bullets, and master each Pacific theatre mission. Make it back safe to the carrier!

items.title: モノクリ Demo
items.short_description: White or Black— A world painted in just two colors. Toggle the colors of your character and the blocks to "forge" your path to the goal in this brand-new puzzle experience.

items.title: Greywind's Legacy - A Text Based, Skill Progression, RPG
items.short_description: This is a text based game that allows the player to step into the town of Alara as the grandson of the late Adventurer Greywind. Choose to avenge your Grandfather by killing the God Obcassus or to instead spend your time exploring the world and skilltree? Or maybe even both? The choice is yours!

items.title: Bob Saves the Princess
items.short_description: Bob Saves the Princess is a Roguelite about controlling the roguelite elements themselves. Build a path with special rooms, equip items, aid in battles and summon creatures to help Bob reach the end alive.

items.title: LouveSystems' Realms Demo
items.short_description: Realms is a strategy game where all actions are taken simultaneously then resolved all at once. With up to 8 players, there's no waiting for your turn here. Battle for land and for riches, upgrade your kingdom and follow your strategy to conquer other realms - become the one to rule them all.

items.title: Band Of Heroes Demo
items.short_description: Band of Heroes is an action-adventure game in development, made to be played solo or with friends in host/client sessions. Face creatures, obtain equipment, complete missions, and strengthen your hero as the game continues to expand.

items.title: Maybe It Meant Something Demo
items.short_description: Platformer journeying a nightmare of meaning.

items.title: Teeth Cutter
items.short_description: A collection of short horror experiences meant to give you horror, disgust, curiosity, dread and much much more

items.title: ItLivesInTheWoods
items.short_description: ItLivesInTheWoods is a short first-person psychological horror set in the forests of Canada. You are Ibrahim, a father who has recently lost his daughter whilst on a hiking trip in the forest last winter. You hope to find out what happened to your daughter and whether you can reunite with her.

items.title: Under Tower Idle Demo
items.short_description: 在这款3D放置点击冒险游戏中，建造、扩张并自动化你的岛屿帝国。收集资源，训练部队，征服危险的地下城。

items.title: Cold Snap
items.short_description: Fast-paced multiplayer snowball battles where physics, chaos, and teamwork decide who survives the final showdown.

items.title: Frontier Legends
items.review_summary: 多半差评 此游戏的 35 篇用户评测中有 31% 为好评。
items.short_description: “Live your Wild West fantasy in Frontier Legends, an open-world frontier adventure where survival, crafting and exploration shape your story. Stake your claim, build your place in the West and uncover what lies beyond the rails.”

items.title: Protocol : Kill Switch Demo
items.short_description: 在这款 Digital-Noir Roguelite 中于主机系统中生存。甩开洋红腐化，在高风险神龛为你的代码超频，并与你升级后的 DAEMON 并肩作战。掌握高压武器，清除成群的掠食性逻辑体。在这个竞技场里，你不是漏洞——你就是病毒。

items.title: Watching the Sky
items.short_description: 看云，控制天气，播放音乐，然后假装这正是你今晚原本计划要做的事。Watching the Sky 是一款平静的观察类沙盒游戏，没有战斗，没有任务，也完全没有压力。

items.title: Raining Cats and Dogs Demo
items.short_description: It’s literally raining cats and dogs. In this game you platform, overcome about 100 unique obstacles, fight 3 janky bosses, find comments added from YouTube Shorts and make it stop raining cats and dogs by fighting Jeff in the end. Here's a message from Jeff: "YOU WILL NEVER STOP ME YEEEHAWWW"

items.title: Vem, Exu Demo
items.short_description: 一款短篇叙事互动体验，你将解开简单的谜题，探索一个情绪化为互动的世界。制作风筝，连接星座，并直面由自身愤怒引发的风暴。

items.title: Triple Chess Demo
items.short_description: Triple Chess reimagines classic chess with three stacked boards and vertical movement, creating deeper strategy, new tactics, and thrilling multi-level battles.

items.title: Shipped In Space
items.short_description: A space faring maze game where you must guide your little ship home through a treacherous field of asteroids

items.title: Animilf Puzzle
items.short_description: Relax with a stylish jigsaw puzzle game featuring suggestive anime artwork of confident mature women. Choose from multiple images, sort by category, play across three difficulty levels, and beat your best completion times at your own pace.

items.title: MonsTile Demo
items.short_description: 为了躲避凶残的冒险者，你来到了这片宁静的小森林！然而，冒险者们很快就会找到这里... 在 8x8 的棋盘上战略性地部署你的怪物，击退来袭的冒险者，守护这片温馨的森林吧！

items.title: Dung Battles
items.short_description: An action puzzle game where you play as a dung beetle, battling against your beetle peers to create the biggest dung ball. Battle online to test your ball rolling skills, strategically roll up items to win in challenge mode, or follow a young beetle's journey home in story mode.

items.title: Galactic Pit Stop Simulator Demo
items.short_description: Run the busiest fuel station on the edge of known space. Refuel incoming ships, trade goods in your market and hangar, upgrade your station, and keep travelers happy — solo or with up to 3 friends in online co-op. Build the ultimate galactic pit stop.

items.title: Richard
items.short_description: Welcome to Rose Academy, home to the brightest students in the world! Play as the new transfer student, George, as he embarks on his campaign against Richard, the most popular kid in school. Develop friendships, master your grades, and talk your way to earning the title of Prom King!

items.title: Escape From Crimson Manor: Trapped Together
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 16 篇用户评测中有 62% 为好评。
items.short_description: 在"Trapped Together"中携手逃离庄园，这是一场以剧情为导向的双人合作解谜战役，这里逻辑至上，且没有死亡的威胁。沟通交流，通过送餐电梯交换物品，并解开错综复杂的谜题。

items.title: Alien Market Simulator
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 89 篇用户评测中有 87% 为好评。
items.short_description: 在你的太空站经营市场。修复并升级太空站，扩展服务，并向各种外星顾客销售商品。体验在太空中管理企业和扩大市场的挑战。

items.title: Backrooms Game Creator
items.short_description: Backrooms Game Creator lets you build and explore your own liminal horror worlds. Design levels, customize enemies, lighting, and items, and create unique experiences—from quiet, eerie spaces to intense survival scenarios.

items.title: Spaceman's Luck Demo
items.short_description: Do you have a Spaceman's Luck? A space strategy game.

items.title: Week of the MEP
items.short_description: A tiny, fan-made visual novel featuring Pavolia Reine. Experience a working week filled with unexpected encounters and humor behind the peafowl persona.

items.title: Medieval Horse Simulator Demo
items.short_description: 作为一匹高贵的骏马在中世纪道路上奔驰，将货物送到繁华的村庄，拉运马车，躲避埋伏，升级马具，证明自己是王国中最可靠的骏马。

items.title: Destructive Contraptions
items.short_description: Destructive Contraptions是一个物理沙盒游戏。你可以用多米诺骨牌、大炮和转轴拼凑出各种疯狂的机械，引爆超级壮观的连锁反应。在这里，你可以尽情设计混乱的发明，把整座巨型城市夷为平地——而且完全不用担心现实中的法律责任，更没有生命危险！

items.title: Pegfinity Demo
items.short_description: One shot can trigger a massive chain reaction. Launch, bounce, and break the board in this physics-based incremental. Upgrade your build, stack combos, and push every run further into chaos.

items.title: Battle Snails Demo
items.short_description: Create a snail and join the battle. Take control of the backyard with Battle Snails! Climb walls, hang upside down and move anywhere. Team up with your friends for a tank game unlike any other!

items.title: Aurora's Awakening
items.short_description: In a mysterious castle, sorceress Aurora has been asleep for centuries. Able to summon powerful Elementals to fight by her side, Ever must protect the fortress from monsters and its most‑sought‑after secret while trying to discover who was responsible for Aurora’s slumber and find a way to wake her.

items.title: Anomaly Zone Renovation
items.review_summary: 特别差评 此游戏的 69 篇用户评测中有 13% 为好评。
items.short_description: A-Zone Renovation is a continuation of the legendary Zone, combining the classic stalker atmosphere with revised mechanics. A large-scale rebalancing, from weapons to economy, a new role-playing system, an improved interface, PvE and PvP activities - the Zone is ready to grow with its community.

items.title: Backrooms: Into the Hole
items.short_description: Discover an in-between space inspired by the Backrooms series. Make your way forward by jumping into holes, find alternative paths, and survive in this labyrinthine dimension. Play solo or in co-op mode and choose your path to the exit… if there is one.

items.title: When We Arrive
items.short_description: 一段合作旅程，穿越奇幻世界，所有事都一起出错。没有战斗，只有糟糕的决定、被偷的口粮、哥布林绑架，以及朋友会来救你的那份绝望期盼。

items.title: Project Confluence
items.short_description: Jump, jetpack, wall run and grapple your way through 3D environments in a race against time. Swap between parallel worlds to add or remove platforms in your way to reach the goal and complete your simulation of Project Confluence.

items.title: KeelOver Demo
items.short_description: KeelOver 是一款疯狂的物理派对游戏，重量即是规则。你的海盗船是一台巨大的天平，通过向对手投掷沉重的战利品来倾斜甲板，自定义你的海盗并保持平衡……否则就去喂鲨鱼！

items.title: 17.waves TD
items.short_description: 《17.waves》是一款适合 2 到 4 名玩家游玩的在线合作塔防游戏。与队友一起制定战略、建造、升级和维护你的塔，保卫基地免收成群的敌方怪物攻击。

items.title: Bunker 14
items.short_description: Escape the bunker by ascending through its endless floors. Check each floor carefully for aberrations to return to the surface.

items.title: Truck Driver: The American Dream
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 13 篇用户评测中有 61% 为好评。
items.short_description: 追逐美国梦，打造卡车司机的职业生涯！接受差事、解锁新卡车、购买新组件、驰骋于开阔的公路，让生活重回正轨，同时学着如何成为一名成功的卡车司机！

items.title: Don't Pop The Balloon
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 11 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: 与好友在这款基于物理的双人合作冒险中联手！通过控制你们之间的距离来操控脆弱的气球，穿越重重障碍。完美的同步是躲避陷阱的关键。你们能完成关卡而不弄破气球（或友谊）吗？

items.title: Soulblaze
items.short_description: Catch Animons and roll some dice in this cute creature-collecting roguelite! Build your team, train them well, and fight your way through several regions. Can you defeat all bosses?

items.title: Barely Alive Demo
items.short_description: A co-op survival party game. Hunt your friends or survive until sunrise.

items.title: Voxie Survivor Demo
items.short_description: 击溃兽潮、闪避虫群、营救幸存者，并在目标驱动的弹幕地狱中粉碎 Boss。打造超强武器组合，掌控混乱；只有真正的幸存者，才能征服一切。

items.title: Visual Novel Nodal Editor Demo
items.short_description: Create complex interactive stories without writing a single line of code. Visual Novel Nodal Editor features an intuitive node-based interface, a powerful layer system, and dynamic animations to bring your narratives to life. Import assets, connect choices, and export your game in one click!

items.title: Flux Ascendant
items.short_description: A fast-paced bullet-heaven roguelite where you tame the four elements. Draft cards, fuse them into game-changing builds, and survive endless waves across Fire, Lightning, Water and Earth, then face the chaotic Finale. Made by one developer, balanced by thousands of test runs.

items.title: Witch's Brew
items.short_description: Best played on a tablet or other touch screen, Witch's Brew is a 1-4 player game that is fun for everyone. Gather around the screen and be the first to collect all of the ingredients for your potion!

items.title: SHULERO – Dice Roguelike
items.short_description: 受 Yacht 启发的 Roguelike（快艇骰子）。掷骰子。打造组合。击败 Boss。作弊才能赢。

items.title: A Frog's Job 2: Froggina
items.short_description: Your life has come to an end, when you find Frog God he seems impressed. Turns out most frog souls need a soul reaper to show them the way to the afterlife. Find out in this challenging puzzle platformer with a unique clock-stopping mechanic!

items.title: Knock Again Demo
items.short_description: This is not a normal clicker. It’s a psychological horror game where mechanical progress hides something dark, twisted, and unsettling. Knock on the door to earn money, upgrade your abilities, and keep knocking. It all seems simple… until it isn’t.

items.title: SHAWA
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 12 篇用户评测中有 83% 为好评。
items.short_description: A typical shawarma stand. But the game notices where you're looking... and what you're ignoring. Endless shifts, a physics simulator, and a horror that only happens when you're not prepared.

items.title: Chickens. Chickens? Chickens!
items.short_description: 🐓 Fight ridiculous chicken hordes in a fast, casual arena shooter. 🐓 Move, dodge, shoot, survive waves, chase a better score, and try not to get buried in feathers.

items.title: CYBERMATRIX Demo
items.short_description: CYBERMATRIX 是一款快节奏的移动游戏。在这款游戏中，你的动作风格非常重要。

items.title: The Adventure of Lioh - The beginning of the End
items.short_description: Shortly after Lordbeni seizes power, Lioh's parents are murdered. The country descends into war. Join Lioh and Shay on a perilous adventure, traverse four dungeons, and confront Lordbeni in a story-filled journey brimming with secrets.

items.title: CYBERMATRIX
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 123 篇用户评测中有 89% 为好评。
items.short_description: CYBERMATRIX 是一款快节奏的移动游戏。在这款游戏中，你的动作风格非常重要。

items.title: Momentum Fracture
items.short_description: Survive as long as you can in this fast-paced brick breaker / bullet hell. Each round unlocks unique upgrades that bend the rules of the game — every powerful buff comes with a risky trade-off.

items.title: Run & Dungeon Demo
items.short_description: Run & Dungeon is a fast paced incremental game where your party of fearless adventurers speed through dungeons in search of legendary loot. Smash through anything blocking your path to earn resources, unlock upgrades, learn powerful new abilities, and expand your team. Delve deep into the unknown...

items.title: Coralium Demo
items.short_description: 2.5D single player platformer demo game about a baby coral exploring a reef. In this demo you will use classic platformer mechanics like jumping, dashing and climbing. This time you will make sure to remain underwater because going out will make you run out of oxygen.

items.title: ArcaneBound Demo
items.short_description: ArcaneBound 是一款像素风 bullet heaven 动作 RPG。 收集魔宠，击败成群怪物，获取稀有卡牌，提升等级，并打造越来越毁灭性的构筑。

items.title: Reaper Actual
items.review_summary: 差评 此游戏的 45 篇用户评测中有 11% 为好评。
items.short_description: 《Reaper Actual》是一款开放世界持续型射击游戏。在饱受战火摧残的辽阔岛屿马罗瓦上,数百名玩家以Tier 1特战员「Reaper」的身份投入战场,彼此交锋,同时对抗占据全岛基础设施的5支NPC势力,在节奏紧凑的FPS战斗与PvPvE对抗中争夺主导权。借助海陆空载具穿梭于五种不同的生态环境,从高强度的HVT行动到稀有资源的采集,培养你的Reaper、经营自己的基地,完成任务以获取装备,并亲手改写这片土地的格局。

items.title: Beltmon Demo
items.short_description: From the endeavor of one broke solo dev, comes the parody creature collector rpg that will make you wonder if another international lawsuit is on the way. Travel through the world of Beltmon as a 31 years old unemployed person who's kicked out of their mom's attic and given their first Beltmon.

items.title: COLORFLY Demo
items.short_description: 当我们外出寻找自己的色彩时，主角"伍里"会得到什么答案？

items.title: Catapulteers Demo
items.short_description: A chaotic 1–4 player co-op physics comedy where cursed Catapulteers haul weird ammo, lose their heads, load one giant catapult, and stop a Troll that really hates catapults.

items.title: Ancient Adventure Demo
items.short_description: Venture forth! Evil has taken over the world. Equip your Weapon of Choice and venture forth. Journey out into the world to avenge your predecessors. Survive the hordes of monsters, seek out to extinguish the source of all Evil, so that one day, your people may finally live in peace.

items.title: Driving Test Simulator Demo
items.short_description: Test your driving skills by completing challenging driving tests and precise, skill-based scenarios.

items.title: Bannerlings Demo
items.short_description: Bannerlings is a strategy roguelike auto battler where you recruit, fuse, and customize units with emblems to build powerful synergies and overcome escalating, randomized encounters.

items.title: Trigonometric Equations Demo
items.short_description: Trigonometric Equations是一款严格的横向卷曲节奏游戏。解开三角方程，在漂浮点和曲线之间准确地飞来飞去！

items.title: FR分解端子導入作業に関する報告
items.short_description: A 3D Action Adventure: explore a rural island in Japan and defeat the enemies in the bottom of labyrinths.

items.title: Eslabong Demo
items.short_description: 在实时竞技场战斗中作战，经营你的俱乐部，在动作战斗与策略经营相结合的玩法中不断成长。招募佣兵，打造队伍，在联赛与杯赛中竞争，登上巅峰。

items.title: 试用版弹弹折射
items.short_description: 《弹弹折射》是一款益智游戏，你需要设置方块，改变子弹的路径，击碎目标。每关都要巧妙运用方格，让子弹射向不同方向，摧毁所有目标。

items.title: Craft & Deliver Demo
items.short_description: Run your own cozy garage workshop—craft handmade products, prepare customer orders, and deliver them to your neighbors while growing your small business.

items.title: Dang Darn Island
items.short_description: Dang Darn Island is a 1-4 player co-op roguelike adventure. Explore the procedurally generated island, delve deep into the temple, smash pots, dodge traps, and see if you can escape with the Gold Idol before the angry volcano loses his temper!

items.title: Moonlite - 1975
items.short_description: Get ready for a cosmic getaway with Moonlite - a lunar looting exploration expedition launching 1975. Grab your trusty shovel & spacesuit and start digging! The current version is Early Access v0.5 - pre-alpha - and includes a single map and game mode called 'Treasure Hunt'.

items.title: Monster Masher
items.short_description: 扔怪物。合成怪物。祈祷深坑别溢出来。Monster Masher是一款舒适又混乱的益智游戏，相同的生物合成更大的怪兽。打出连击，对抗Boss，假装你没上瘾。但你上瘾了。真的。

items.title: Unclouded Demo
items.short_description: Unclouded builds upon the simplicity of a minesweeper with some basic resource-management mechanics to create an engaging, replayable, singleplayer experience that feels both fresh and familiar.

items.title: 在线地球：Earth Online
items.short_description: 继《芝士财商》之后，宋雅网络第二款游戏《在线地球》来了。这是一款像素风多人联机生存游戏，你将与全球玩家共同生活在一颗圆形的像素地球上：收集资源、搭建庇护所、抵御黑夜生物，还要提防其他幸存者。游戏支持数十人同服协作或对抗，可组部落开荒，也可孤狼探险。动态天气、季节变化和完整的生活制造体系，加上地球自转带来的真实昼夜与资源分布，让生存充满变数。Steam即将上线，在这颗低像素、高自由的小小星球上，活出你的故事。

items.title: 49DAYS Demo
items.short_description: Become the host of an afterlife teahouse. For 49 days, serve the final cup to the departed. Experience a deep brewing system based on authentic traditions. Listen to the secrets of unique spirits, change their fates, and face the truth of your forgotten past.

items.title: Chainsaw Woods
items.short_description: 误入森林后，踏上逃离之路的生存恐怖游戏。作为舞台的森林在每次游玩时都会随机生成。支持最多 2 人多人联机。与同伴合作，设法逃离这片森林吧！

items.title: Act! 细胞调律 Demo
items.short_description: 基于完全创新玩法的自由输入音游《Act! 细胞调律》现已开放免费试玩版！惬意享受、尽情沉浸；在潜意识的海洋中，调律独属于你的乐章吧！

items.title: HEXED DELTA
items.short_description: You are a triangle. The world scrolls. Don't fall behind. HEXED DELTA is a fast-paced infinite platformer where everything - the player, the platforms, the enemies, the effects - are made from raw geometric shapes. No sprites. No textures. Just polygons, lines, and math.

items.title: 群星收割者 Starvester
items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 189 篇用户评测中有 76% 为好评。
items.short_description: 一款简短的增量游戏，围绕着扩展一个横跨整个恒星系统的工厂，在太空中建造巨型超级结构。部署成群的无人机，开采资源，解锁升级，并收集恒星的能量！

items.title: Cargo Lines Demo
items.short_description: Build a bustling railway network and juggle cargo transport in real time. New stations appear, the flow of goods shifts constantly, deadlines loom, and trains collide if you don't keep your eyes on them. Keep your cool and master the chaos as orders pile up, and every second counts.

items.title: 安西娅的正义
items.short_description: 时间是2248年。你扮演的是宇航公会的飞行员安西娅。她正在与一支海盗舰队作战。游戏中，你需要摧毁四艘敌方首领舰。

items.title: 异世界生活：餐厅&杂货店 Demo
items.short_description: 你被一股神秘力量召唤到了剑与魔法的奇幻世界中，幸运的是“它”为你提前筹备了一家刚开业的餐厅&杂货店。在成为一名传奇冒险者之前，先努力的经营这家店并存活下来吧。

items.title: HellSlave II: Judgment of the Archon Demo
items.short_description: 《地狱仆从II：神罚降临》是一款黑暗奇幻地牢探险游戏，你需在天堂净化世界前消灭所有恶魔领主。自定义角色、掌握残酷的回合制战斗，探索介于神罚与诅咒之间的末日世界。

items.title: Plant Budz 98
items.short_description: Raise a pet on a retro desktop. Then play as them across 4 completely different games.

items.title: Frontier: Path of Shadows Demo
items.short_description: 与敌人激战，升级你的小队，探索全新星球！在《Frontier: Path of Shadows》试玩版中做出艰难抉择，左右整个星区的命运。体验精心打造的25世纪世界，以及融合了X-COM与最终幻想风格的战术战斗。

items.title: Trakonius
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 63 篇用户评测中有 85% 为好评。
items.short_description: In the merciless sands of the arena, a gladiator is forced to fight for survival. Trakonius defies Mars, the God of War, in this Action Roguelike experience! Face gladiators, mythological creatures, and deadly challenges across four brutal arenas. The truth can only be revealed through combat!

items.title: 反社会症候群 Demo
items.short_description: 你与七名陌生人被困在一座乡村宅邸中，被迫参与一场杀戮游戏。 对其他人而言，活下去的唯一方式是找出杀手。 而对你来说，亲爱的杀手，唯一的“活路”便是将他们全部杀死。

items.title: Signalfall
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 12 篇用户评测中有 91% 为好评。
items.short_description: 迫降在一颗充满敌意的星球上，建造自动化资源开采前哨站以求生存。 保卫你的基地，管理电力网络，并将资源发送至轨道以解锁全新科技。

items.title: Mall Together Demo
items.short_description: Run your mall. Open new stores, sign contracts with leading brands, hire teammates, and meet customer needs. Play with friends or go solo, and enjoy the growth of your mall. You can open two stores in this demo version.

items.title: Eternal Dread Demo
items.short_description: Eternal Dread is a Medieval Dark Fantasy Horror game. You wake up in a dungeon. Everyone is gone. Have your premonitions finally come true? You must use what you can find around you to survive.

items.title: Curtain Call
items.short_description: Explore a cursed theater and persevere through all manners of dangers in this first-person survival horror game. Developed by third year students from Breda University of Applied Sciences.

items.title: 别碰蜗牛
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 49 篇用户评测中有 81% 为好评。
items.short_description: 世界首款「反治愈系」放置游戏。你只有一条命。一只蜗牛将无休止地追逐你。一旦被它碰到，你将永远无法再次游玩。

items.title: Once Upon The Universe
items.short_description: Once Upon The Universe is a god-game that takes you to the VERY beginning of creation. You begin the game just seconds after the big bang, with nothing but an empty space and a lot of super hot hydrogen in the entire universe. Fill the universe with life and watch it thrive - or destory it.

items.title: Clicker Ore Demo
items.short_description: 深入地底，抵抗不断上升的高温，发现独特的镐，与地牢首领战斗，成为深渊之主。游戏将以 Free to Play 形式上线。

items.title: Lexispell
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 11 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: Strategy meets physics, in this roguelike word game, where you combine spelling with cool upgrades to score high. Spell, m€rge, upgr@de, coz¥, combinati*ns, high$core, hippopotomonstrosesquipedaliophobia!

items.title: SLUGMOUTH Demo
items.short_description: SLUGMOUTH is a survival fps rpg set in a post-apocalyptic wasteland full of dangerous clans fighting a perpetual war. Bullets hit hard and survival demands careful resource management and tactical shooting.

items.title: Automaton Heart
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 21 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: Automaton Heart is an RPG with platforming elements where you visit obscure and interesting places while upgrading your organs and strategizing about which items to bring along.

items.title: Snake
items.short_description: Features: - Classic score-based gameplay - Increasing difficulty over time - Simple, readable visual design - Fast restart and replay loop - Singleplayer arcade experience

items.title: Plateau Demo
items.short_description: Build and sculpt your own peaceful settlement in this relaxing city builder. A sandbox that lets you freely edit the terrain, add forests, rivers, paths and buildings without the pressure of resource management, timers or a fail state. It's pure creation, relaxation and admiring your little plateau.

items.title: Retail Rivals Demo
items.short_description: Build your retail empire inside a shopping mall. Open multiple stores, sabotage rivals, and play solo or with up to 8 players. Choose different match objectives or play endless mode and compete for retail domination.

items.title: 键启末日 Demo
items.short_description: 每一次敲击都是魔法的迸射！这是一款打字塔防游戏。在末日到来的圣地，你需要依托寄宿着远古神明的圣骸，通过快速且精准地打出古老的圣言，来激活其中沉睡的守护魔法，抵挡如潮水般涌来的末日怪物群。

items.title: 暴杀残雨之夜
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 21 篇用户评测中有 95% 为好评。
items.short_description: 残雨之夜，给予爱或残忍在你一念之间。

items.title: Solis
items.short_description: Solis a hand drawn adventure. The city of Solis never sleeps — and tonight, neither will you. Elixer, the company you've dedicated yourself to, has gathered its people for an end-of-year celebration with a staggering promise at its heart: eternal life.

items.title: Shamania
items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 137 篇用户评测中有 75% 为好评。
items.short_description: 莎玛尼娅》是一款开放世界生存游戏，在游戏中，您将与朋友们共同创作、战斗和探索一个生机勃勃的沙盒世界。扩大您的基地，使其成为生存的枢纽，收集资源，掌握专业技能，从而解锁新的工具和机会！

items.title: Cemetery Simulator (Demo)
items.short_description: DEMO版的棺材当然是最便宜的松木！单人或与好友一起经营森林墓地。首先清理场地，然后拿起铁锹，挖出第一个墓坑并举办葬礼。看看你们中谁最擅长挥舞铁锹和打理墓碑吧！

items.title: System Ascension: Idle Core
items.short_description: Take control of The System. Master multiple interlocking power sources to build a singular, planetary engine in this narrative idle game. Features a fully voiced story, minimalist UI, and cross-platform play. The old world must fall for The System to rise.

items.title: Kiki's Nightmare Demo
items.short_description: An adventure RPG where you step in the shoes of a fearless hero. Navigate through unhospitable terrain, fierce enemies and save Kiki from her own terrifying dream!

items.title: Momo Don't Leave
items.short_description: 回到那座从未改变的小镇……以及本该已经死去的朋友身边。一部关于记忆，以及拒绝向前所要付出代价的心理恐怖视觉小说。

items.title: The Planetary Archive Demo
items.short_description: The Planetary Archive is a retro space survival game about grief. Explore the galaxy, maintain your space station, scavenge for replacement parts, and start to understand why you're out here.

items.title: Card Idle: Rise of the Eight
items.short_description: 收集卡牌、强化卡牌、构筑你的牌组。 战斗全程自动进行的放置型卡牌游戏。 玩家唯一的任务，就是“选择使用哪些卡牌”。 在由八大种族与其王统治的停滞世界中， 通过选择与牌组构筑改变纷争， 让文明再次向前推进。 放置的尽头，是策略与故事。

items.title: Total Blade: Mythology Demo
items.short_description: Gather soldiers on a 16th-century overworld map and lead over 1,300 troops in real-time TPS action. Manage your empire, command your army, and fight rival nations and mythical monsters in this grand-scale sandbox strategy.

items.title: WHISPERWOOD Demo
items.short_description: WhisperWood is a survival horror game inspired by the classics. Powered by Unreal Engine 5, it drops you into a nightmare where ammo is scarce and every shadow hides a threat. Solve puzzles, manage your inventory, and survive the darkness.

items.title: Primordio
items.short_description: 在虚空中求生。在这款 Roguelite 弹幕射击生存游戏中，控制一缕纯净的能量之火。用连锁闪电击穿蜂拥而至的原初实体，通过强力升级提升等级，努力活下去，直到揭开……PRIMORDIO 的秘密。

items.title: 魔塔国度 -Tower Realm- Demo
items.short_description: 《魔塔国度（Tower Realm）》是一款高策略性的魔塔 RPG 合集：固定地图与数值、自动回合制战斗、资源与路线精算。你可以硬核无补给通关，也可用“绿钥匙”降低难度；通关点数还能解锁自定义挑战，获得更强的挑战或是畅快开爽，随你喜欢！

items.title: 超载突围
items.short_description: 操控锈蚀机甲闯入未知区域，在快节奏俯视角生存动作中闪避敌潮、攻击升级。选择随机武器、技能强化和被动模块，组合不同战斗流派，击败 Boss，解锁新地图，在超载边缘杀出重围。

items.title: Auto Battle Girl Demo
items.short_description: 《战娘自走棋》是一款以戈尔大陆为背景的单机自走棋游戏，特色在于所有角色均为拥有超凡力量的女性生灵。游戏融合卡牌与肉鸽元素，玩家需收集并升级战娘，激活羁绊效果以提升战斗力。领袖和圣物作为战斗辅助，提供额外属性加成和特殊技能。玩家通过策略布局战娘站位，自动战斗直至消灭敌人。在这片神秘大陆上，体验独特的战斗魅力和策略对决！

items.title: 战娘自走棋
items.short_description: 《战娘自走棋》是一款以戈尔大陆为背景的单机自走棋游戏，特色在于所有角色均为拥有超凡力量的女性生灵。游戏融合卡牌与肉鸽元素，玩家需收集并升级战娘，激活羁绊效果以提升战斗力。领袖和圣物作为战斗辅助，提供额外属性加成和特殊技能。玩家通过策略布局战娘站位，自动战斗直至消灭敌人。在这片神秘大陆上，体验独特的战斗魅力和策略对决！

items.title: 节度使战略：安史之乱 Demo
items.short_description: 天宝十四载，安史兵变，祸起幽州，两京失守，叛军进逼灵州，形势岌岌可危。玩家将领朔方支营节度使之职，重整官军攻势，以对抗叛军，恢复大唐江山。

items.title: Endless TD
items.short_description: A simple yet unending tower defense game with a mix of idling and incremental progress. Tons of upgrades to purchase and endless progress to achieve.

items.title: MarbleFlow
items.short_description: MarbleFlow 是一款物理益智游戏，你需要放置各种装置和轨道，引导弹珠到达目标位置。 通过摆放物体并利用它们之间的互动来解决每个谜题。 在弹珠与装置发出的轻柔声音中，体验既平静又富有挑战性的解谜过程。

items.title: 深渊构筑
items.short_description: 卡牌构筑 + 自动战斗的 Roguelike 策略游戏。组建队伍，构筑卡组，在随机事件与多变规则中生存。 胜负取决于战前决策。每一次选择，都会影响你的构筑与命运。

items.title: Life of a Cockroach Demo
items.short_description: Yes, you’re a cockroach, so your top priority now is to survive. Explore an urban environment from a whole new perspective in this open-world 3D adventure filled with challenges, tasks, and dangers. Discover hidden places, master your skills, and become the ultimate survivor insect!

items.title: 你予我的羽翼和星辰 -Your Astrum, My Alae- Demo
items.short_description: 这是一部纯爱向、单女主、多结局视觉小说。游戏背景为大学校园，主题涵盖天文、钢琴、科研。两位主角均为大学高年级学生。即将毕业的学年里，他们在星空下偶然邂逅，又会擦出怎样的火花？本作包含国语、粤语双语配音。

items.title: Cochonnet
items.short_description: Play Pétanque online with your friends, the traditional french ball-throwing sport where 2 teams compete to land their metal balls closest to the target.

items.title: Dice Rogues Demo
items.short_description: Dice Rogues is a tactical roguelite with infinite possibilities where you upgrade your dice and harness unpredictable rogue faces (X2, baguette, croissant, etc.) to bend fate, outplay the House, and survive a new roll each run.

items.title: Hyper Sphere
items.short_description: 《Hyper Sphere》是一款高节奏的肉鸽（Roguelite）弹幕射击游戏。在邪恶方块的包围中射击、格挡与闪避。组合各种古怪道具打造“崩坏”级别的数值，将敌人的子弹格挡回去，击败最终 Boss。

items.title: 诈骗园区模拟器: 地下王国
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 19 篇用户评测中有 84% 为好评。
items.short_description: 在混乱支配的城市中，建立并经营你的地下诈骗帝国。通过非法手段获取资源，招募并管理各类技能员工，扩张势力，自动化运营体系。在风险与利益之间做出抉择，揭开隐藏在城镇深处的黑暗秘密。

items.title: Penguin Rescue Run
items.short_description: A 3D platformer where you guide a penguin through obstacles, platforming challenges, and creative puzzles while exploring different environments filled with danger, precision jumps, and exciting challenges along the way.

items.title: The Sound of Piano Demo
items.short_description: A hardcore keyboard rhythm game featuring pure piano tracks. Every note you hit generates a real key sound for a true piano response. Designed for intermediate players and beyond, use our unique skill test algorithm to discover your rating. No AI-generated music, just raw human-crafted tracks.

items.title: Vocal Horror Stories - Gaja Demo
items.short_description: The first episode of a voice-sensitive episodic horror game, in which you play as Shivani, a young woman battling with phonophobia. Why did her mother go missing? Who is the elephant-headed entity she keeps seeing? Can you speak to him?

items.title: N.E.R.D
items.short_description: N.E.R.D is a story-driven escape room puzzle game, brought to life as a gripping interactive movie. Inspired by cult classic thrillers, this is an experience that will pull you in - and won’t let go. Dark, intense, and deeply unsettling, every moment pushes you further into the unknown.

items.title: 0KEY!
items.short_description: 0KEY! transforms the classic board game into a modern, competitive board game experience. Play with friends or match with players worldwide, level up, unlock exclusive cues, and prove you're the best. Are you ready to take your seat at the table?

items.title: 孤胆少女
items.short_description: 化身孤胆少女，在被异形与畸变怪物侵占的末世中，单枪匹马对抗无尽尸潮虫潮，收集资源升级军火库，用火力撕碎黑暗与血腥，体验肾上腺素狂飙的纯粹爽感！

items.title: Are You A Pilot
items.short_description: Are You A Pilot is a free-to-play neon arcade runner about speed, reflexes, and survival. Dodge obstacles, collect plasma, fire lasers, unlock skins, chase high scores, and jump into online squad runs.

items.title: Medic Please!
items.short_description: 最多4人的基于物理的在线合作救援模拟。搬运、拖拽、投掷——为了拯救病人不择手段！通过治疗赚取金钱并升级你的诊所。

items.title: 纸上征服者 Demo
items.short_description: 游戏与众不同的是放弃了六边形和四边形的地块儿。采用了更贴近现实的边境线这一部分完全为手工手绘 游戏剧情、在二战中扮演指挥官，在20回合内占领全部敌方地块 游戏时长，每个关咔5min，轻松休闲

items.title: The Goddess's Will Demo
items.short_description: Dive into a 2.5D isometric action RPG adventure inspired by late-90s and early-00s classics. Face cunning enemy factions, explore a layered world filled with vivid characters, mythic stories, and handcrafted environments. Immerse yourself in a dangerous and unforgiving golden age of power fantasy.

items.title: 大尸的自我修养
items.short_description: 这是一场在末日生存中展开的非凡冒险。你将扮演一名拥有操控丧尸能力的小女孩。这种力量既是武器也是钥匙，你需要策略性地号令亡者，破解环境谜题，突破层层险阻，最终揭开哥哥失踪的真相。

items.title: Meow Over Moo
items.short_description: Unleash tactical mayhem in a ruthless cat-vs-cow board game! Experience cute, 1v1 pure strategy with symmetric factions, deterministic combat, and zero first-player advantage. From relaxed play to competitive mastery, every move counts in this perfectly balanced, turn-based showdown.

items.title: New Folder
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 17 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: You log on to a computer having no clue of what lies within. Explore its files, solve puzzles to recover missing pieces, and decipher passwords to enter otherwise prohibited folders. As you delve deeper into its content, you’ll find that there is a greater mystery to be solved.

items.title: Medium Chronicles: Room 644 Demo
items.short_description: 你必须说话才能生存。但说话可能杀死你。对着麦克风低语仪式 — 而恶魔正在追捕你发出的每一个声音。

items.title: 史莱姆矿难 Into the Slimy Mines
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 14 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: 一款融合卡牌玩法的 roguelike 塔防游戏！你的飞船迫降到了一颗史莱姆横行的卫星上，你需要保护矿区并营救船员。购买卡牌和补充包，扩建隧道，发掘强力组合，踩扁那些烦人的史莱姆。挖掘、建造、防守——最终离开这颗该死的卫星！

items.title: RoboDeal Simulator Prologue
items.short_description: 在冰封星球赛拉里斯9号上设计、制造并交易机器人。效忠阵营，升级设施，在《机器人交易模拟器》中铸就你的机械传奇。

items.title: 春日狂想曲：情窦初开的秘密
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 58 篇用户评测中有 98% 为好评。
items.short_description: 女子高中生加藤詩为了帮助摄影师男友，她开始接触形形色色的人与不同的世界，也逐渐发现自己内心深处从未察觉的另一面。在欲望与选择交织的故事中，她将迎来怎样的结局，取决于你的选择~

items.title: 卡牌修真：九宫幻境录 Demo
items.short_description: 《卡牌修真：九宫幻境录 Demo》是一款基于卡牌交互设计的修仙生存游戏，你因意外坠落到吸取寿命的幻境中，但这里灵气充沛，作为凡人的你，必须抓住这次仙缘，在幻境中提升境界，学习各种功法和炼制丹药法器。但同时也需要迎接来自恶劣天气、温饱生存、妖兽血月等各种挑战，找寻逃离之法！

items.title: Human: Profit Demo
items.short_description: An accurate depiction of our world, baked into a short, classic incremental game. Take over Grandpa's farm, rebuild the town, and do whatever it takes to succeed. Also rabbits.

items.title: Revive & Repeat
items.short_description: 《Revive & Repeat》是一款卡牌类 Roguelike 地牢探索游戏，你可以组合增益与神器，打造疯狂的构筑，挑战首领，并在排行榜上与其他玩家竞争——每一次死亡都让你更强大。

items.title: Control, I'm Not Coming Back
items.review_summary: 好评如潮 此游戏的 760 篇用户评测中有 99% 为好评。
items.short_description: Control, I'm Not Coming Back is a short and emotional narrative game about a lost astronaut searching for a reason to keep going forward while facing the emptiness of space. Inspired by the Hopecore aesthetic, it’s a story about positivism, friendship and our human connection with Voyager 1.

items.title: Orc Incremental Demo
items.short_description: 从一名兽人出发，建立一支势不可挡的黑暗军团，征服世界。在这款放置自动战斗游戏中，完善你的阵型，召唤强大的野兽，解锁强力升级，每次重生后愈发强大。

items.title: Echoes of Creation: Origin
items.short_description: An open-world 3D action RPG with real-time combat, class advancement, and loot-driven progression.

items.title: 萝莉忍者村
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 53 篇用户评测中有 90% 为好评。
items.short_description: 一夕之间被毁灭家园的巨魔愤而决定向这群萝莉忍者復仇。 潜入忍者之里，教训这群嚣张的小鬼吧！

items.title: 3876 AD: Corruption
items.short_description: A hardcore military sci-fi survival roguelike set in the post-apocalyptic world of 3876 AD. Engage in tense tactical combat, scavenge for resources, complete dangerous quests, and explore an immersive lore full of dark themes and meaningful decisions.

items.title: ONE SKILL - Drive or Fall Demo
items.short_description: Test your skills on various platforms and obstacles built high in the sky! Master your driving as you maneuver through thrilling challenges and perilous situations to reach the finish line.

items.title: 冰点之下
items.review_summary: 好评如潮 此游戏的 1,439 篇用户评测中有 96% 为好评。
items.short_description: 一场寒潮将整个世界冰封，三位性格迥异的女孩闯入了你的生活。你将带领她们踏上这片极寒死地的冒险之路！当丧尸低吟化作呢喃挽歌，当暴风雪模糊了善恶边界。前方等待你们的究竟是希望还是阴谋？而此刻，那枚决定命运的骰子，正在你的指间发烫...

items.title: ハムタンク！
items.short_description: This is a top-down shooting game where a small and adorable hamster pilots a gigantic tank to fight off enemies. Players control the tank from a bird’s-eye view, shooting at enemies that attack from all directions while progressing through each stage.

items.title: VoxelMancy
items.short_description: Online voxel sandbox where you can build anything imaginable. Forget simple cubes – sculpt slopes, curves, and structures of any size with many realistic materials. Your imagination is the only limit!

items.title: 侵染：有你存在的夏日 Demo
items.short_description: 本作是一款包含夏日、少女与悬疑要素的视觉小说，6位可攻略角色。我有一个好朋友，只有我能看到她。医生断言她是我的妄想，她却自称来自异界。遵循医嘱，我来到一座海岛休养，各怀心思的少女们闯入了我的世界…谁可托付真心？虚妄还是现实？夏日海风将息，我必须做出选择。

items.title: Swish Ball Clicker Demo
items.short_description: 一款超可爱画风的像素护肝篮球放置挂机游戏，每次点击即是得分。升级球员、自动投篮，在轻松的2D独立球场上从默默无闻的菜鸟一步步成为全明星。非常适合在工作摸鱼时在后台挂机运行。

items.title: Shadow Saw Us
items.short_description: After their grandfather’s passing, Bell and Mark inherit the burden he left behind as the spirits he once sealed begin to break free. With the help of Banana, a Tani spirit and his old friend, they must help people, search for enchanted blades, and face dangerous spirits like Isacus.

items.title: ALBERO
items.short_description: ALBERO是一款第三人称动作游戏，在游戏中，你可以破坏覆盖战场的六边形地形来采集资源，并突破如潮水般涌来的怪物。不要害怕倒在蜂拥而至的敌人面前。死亡只不过是让你成为更强大的战士并通关章节的崭新起点。要不要一起去狠狠教训一下那些看扁你娇小可爱外表的怪物们？

items.title: Caldra
items.short_description: 构筑牌组、战术博弈与惊险逆转——终极对战卡牌游戏！ 通过买卖卡牌强化你的牌组，向胜利发起挑战。是干扰对手，还是抓住时机发起决定性一击？ Caldra 是一款以策略与心理博弈为核心的对战型卡组构筑游戏。

items.title: Dry Meadow Demo
items.short_description: Fight, sneak & scavenge your way through the first level of Dry Meadow. Light fires, drink vodka and smoke cigarettes in shaky hideouts.

items.title: Up-Beat!! Demo
items.short_description: Up-Beat!! is an action-packed boxing game heavily inspired by Punch-Out!! - take on the first 4 fights of the intro circuit in this tough-as-nails demo of the game!

items.title: Anomalous Object Demo
items.short_description: 与外界完全隔绝的警卫室。你必须服从命令，彻底搜查这间密室。仅凭有限的装备与线索，找出隐藏的“异常实体”并查明其真面目。 请记住：当你在观察它时，它也正在暗处注视着你。

items.title: Cat Vs Slime 猫咪大战史莱姆
items.short_description: 创新重力叠叠乐塔防！猫咪可层层堆叠，组成高塔攻击空中敌人。史莱姆从地面、传送门穿梭而来，左右两路夹击猫屋。18 种猫咪、36 道关卡，用策略搭建最强防线，守护喵星家园！

items.title: Bullet Spell Demo
items.short_description: 在这款充满魔幻色彩的间谍惊悚游戏中，躲避、穿梭并协调行动，在枪林弹雨和敌人的包围中杀出一条血路！同时操控双胞胎姊妹奥罗拉和索拉娜，考验你的多工处理能力；或与第二名玩家共享控制权，共同合作，确保双胞胎姊妹的生存。

items.title: GrigoriNightDragon
items.short_description: GrigoriNightDragon is a captivating RPG set in Elyria's fantasy realm. Discover quests, adventures, and formidable dragons guarding castles. Multiple endings ensure endless replayability and a multitude of challanges awit you on your journey!

items.title: Gravitten Demo
items.short_description: 免费试玩来袭！操控反重力小猫 Gravitten，驾驭环境中变幻莫测的物理法则。抢先体验完整版 5 大特色生态区中的 2 个，通过操控重力与视角，解开精妙复杂的谜题。

items.title: F.R.E.D.'s Ascent
items.short_description: A 2.5D rage platformer. Nine zones, each with its own physics — ice, wind, sticky floors, low gravity. You are F.R.E.D., a small machine kept asleep beneath a world that never wanted you to wake. Climb anyway. Wanderer, No-Save, and Speedrun modes.

items.title: The Retro Exorcist
items.short_description: You've been hired to perform exorcisms on all sorts of entities. The only thing you can't seem to understand is...why do they all haunt video games?

items.title: Office Inspector
items.short_description: 识别神秘办公大楼中的异常与危险，并通过电梯做出正确的决策以成功逃脱。

items.title: Magic Cauldron - Forgotten Island Demo
items.short_description: This game combines a deck-builder with turn-based combat and elements of a classic point-and-click adventure ... all infused with plenty of Magic Cauldron humor.

items.title: Trebuchet Simulator Demo
items.short_description: 物理模拟器，你将控制投石机向城堡发射石头。调整臂长、抛射物质量、枢轴高度、释放角度和基础角度以使破坏力最大化。

items.title: Pop Balloons and Drop People
items.short_description: 戳破气球和让小人掉下去的放置类游戏

items.title: 失焦 Out of Focus
items.short_description: 一桩旧案，一段无法对焦的真相。你是一名警察，你要与同事们一起解开这起看似寻常的谋杀案背后的故事。 本格推理设定。一切基于现实逻辑。 你要解开的，可不仅仅是这个案子那么简单。

items.title: 挖掘者米娜
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 1,400 篇用户评测中有 84% 为好评。
items.short_description: 扮演米娜，一位声名显赫的挖掘者，踏上拯救被诅咒岛屿的绝望之旅。在《挖掘者米娜》这款由《铲子骑士》开发者带来的全新游戏中，挥鞭痛击敌人，钻入地下，探索完美的像素世界！

items.title: Abyss Ring Demo
items.short_description: 生存、烹饪、征服！ 在Roguelike中通过烹饪怪物挑战最深层。200+装备与随机地图，为你带来无限可能的全新体验。

items.title: Trace of the Villa
items.short_description: Jin has spent years searching for his missing sister, pursuing leads that took him to a remote, decaying mansion where he recovered manifests and hints that indicate his sister may still be alive, somewhere at the end of the trail he is about to follow.

items.title: Call of Elmore
items.short_description: Call of Elmore is an experimental arcade-styled action-adventure game with a unique blend of top-down and sidescrolling gameplay. Acquire a larger arsenal, explore the region, and survive while figuring out how a simple Lighthouse flame has laid waste to the colony.

items.title: さーきゅらーディフェンス!!～とある辺境惑星開拓事務所、３０日の記録～
items.short_description: ”Sacular Defense" is a real-time tower defense game in which you intercept enemies by placing circles around them to prevent them from hitting the planet in the center of the screen. Strengthen your turrets and defend your planet from the endless enemies!

items.title: 胡闹赶鸭 试玩版
items.short_description: 这是一款能让你和朋友喊到缺氧的声控派对游戏。放下键盘鼠标，用你们的尖叫声把鸭群赶向终点——或者因为某人的一嗓子，把这群倒霉鸭子全吼下悬崖！

items.title: 1.76复古沉默
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 23 篇用户评测中有 91% 为好评。
items.short_description: 全新传奇《1.76复古沉默》，耗时两年精心雕琢，倾尽心血打造诚意巨献！以原创剧情为灵魂的基础上，它保留了传奇的核心玩法（打怪、升级、爆装备、攻沙巴克）超级大陆为舞台🌏，秉持“不肝不氪”的友好理念🥰、不同职业的多种流派等独具特色的新内容，让游戏体验既怀旧又新奇

items.title: 時折記 -Tokioriki- Demo
items.short_description: After a strange dream, high school student Kanata Tanaka notices small cracks in his ordinary life. This demo covers the prologue to the first half of Chapter 1, introducing limited after-school time, map exploration, diary choices, and the first shadow of a story where you cannot choose everything.

items.title: Fearsome Night
items.short_description: An anonymous email leads you to your recently deceased grandmother's house, asking you to find something hidden inside. Someone wanted you there. Something else was already waiting. Investigate, solve disturbing puzzles and survive the horrors lurking in the shadows.

items.title: Kim's Farm
items.short_description: Kim’s Farm is a story-driven survival experience inspired by real accounts from North Korean defectors who were once imprisoned. Torture and violence can take your life. Breaking the rules can lead to immediate execution. You play as a young girl struggling to survive with her mother and sister.

items.title: Lutarus Demo
items.short_description: An epic RPG adventure. Follow Luxtar and his loyal lutaru on a quest to save their community. Navigate dangers, safeguard his mental well-being, and uncover ancient secrets to shape the fate of humanity.

items.title: Reclaim: Earth Protocol Demo
items.short_description: 一款小队战术自走战斗游戏。构建强大的单位协同，升级你的战斗阵容，部署无人机支援，在激烈战斗中夺回地球。

items.title: 王者争雄
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 61 篇用户评测中有 88% 为好评。
items.short_description: 耗时两年!呕心沥血!诚意之作! 原创剧情+超级大陆+不肝不氪 上线即送:专属自动回收 自动拾取 自动经验 专属法师单职业+特色剧情自由探索，专属BUFF任意搭配，百玩不腻

items.title: 101 Cats in Hanoi
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 10 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: 加入这场冒险，在精心打造的河内景观中，寻找101只小猫咪🐾的藏身之处。🏆赢取众多成就。你能找到多少只呢？😺快来抓紧时间！⏱️

items.title: 巨石岛
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 71 篇用户评测中有 67% 为好评。
items.short_description: 带领巨石小人们围绕神秘方块建立不断繁荣的部落。收集资源、构筑技能、维持增长循环，在越来越夸张的特效与数值洪流中，把整个系统推向失控。

items.title: 武道残编
items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 21 篇用户评测中有 76% 为好评。
items.short_description: 《武道残编》是一款以武侠江湖为背景的放置类 RPG 游戏，融合了修炼成长、武学传承、宠物养成与江湖奇遇等核心玩法。玩家将扮演一名初入江湖的武者，从侠隐村出发，一路游历洛阳、襄阳、华山、少林、武当、峨眉、昆仑、大理、桃花岛、光明顶，最终登临缥缈峰，成就一代武林宗师。

items.title: Mighty Meow
items.short_description: 勇敢小喵喵 是一款拥有基地建设要素的可爱动作 RPG 游戏。你将在充满机器人的实验室中冲刺战斗去解救可爱的动物们。挑战弹幕汹涌的强大首领并建造热闹的动物据点。让毛茸茸的伙伴为你打造强力装备同时探索全新的地下城。

items.title: 60病 The 60-Second Syndrome Demo
items.short_description: 你将在60秒后死去。 本作是一款单人恐怖逃脱游戏。被困在仅有60秒时间循环中的男人，必须从密室中逃脱。 在封闭的房间中，每当你死亡，时间都会重置。观察不断重复的现象，记住其中的变化，并从循环中逃脱。

items.title: 闲鱼修仙录 Demo
items.short_description: 一款修仙题材的Roguelike卡牌策略游戏。选择李闲鱼、小雪或陆寒渊三位修士之一，在 随机生成的三幕冒险中构建卡组、收集法宝、布置阵法。214张法术卡牌涵盖摸鱼、暴力 、灼烧、反伤等多种流派，金木水火土五行相克影响每一次出牌决策。98个随机奇遇、42 件法宝、12种阵法、9种结局、21级天道试炼难度。每一局都是独一无二的修仙之旅。

items.title: Unholy Employer Simulator (Demo)
items.short_description: A roguelike, incremental business-sim where you cultivate a family environment, make BIG profit and sacrifice the lives of your employees to the devil. Welcome to the world of business.

items.title: 爱里斯 奥德赛
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 10 篇用户评测中有 50% 为好评。
items.short_description: 《爱里斯 奥德赛》是一款文字冒险游戏。在涩谷的中心，一名寻找家人的孤儿女孩与一位拥有魔法的犯罪调查官因命运相遇。他们的旅程将挑战自我，并引发与不可想象的力量的战斗。一场现代幻想冒险即将展开。

items.title: 漂流彼岸 Demo
items.short_description: 无名少年为了获得美好的来生，决定漂流至世界尽头。 他将驾驶船只，深入一个黑暗危险却纷繁有趣的世界，并使用他的鱼叉对付路上的麻烦。

items.title: D-BEAT HEROES Demo
items.short_description: D-BEAT HEROES is a grid-based tag-team action RPG! Choose powerful abilities to take with you into combat and fight against your enemies on the grid! Protect Daylight City from the forces of evil and maintain order. Do it before it's too late!

items.title: 星尘轨迹：魔女之愿
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 216 篇用户评测中有 82% 为好评。
items.short_description: 时机已到——是时候踏上冒险之旅了！跟随少女战士「星」和少年法师「悠」，一起寻找愿望之星的秘密！体验精美的像素动画演出，感受经典SRPG战斗的策略魅力……命运的终点，正等待着你们共同揭晓。

items.title: Hypnos Demo
items.short_description: 玩家被困在箱中，结识了钥匙。为寻出路，他沉浸入丘姆之中，在那里他的抉择改变着发生的一切，推近或拉远他对那神秘源头的追寻。

items.title: Deathward Demo
items.short_description: Seek Death as you face dangerous foes, solve puzzles, and explore forgotten dungeons to become the ultimate necromancer.

items.title: Spright Demo
items.short_description: Spright is a 2D action-adventure about a lone warrior in a diving helm, drawn into the ruins of a fallen world. Craft weapons, bend spacetime, and fight through hostile environments, survive ambushes, and explore strange realms.

items.title: Hearth & Shadow
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 10 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: Hearth & Shadow - is a card-based strategy game where you develop your settlement and defend it from monster invasions. Try different combinations, unlock new buildings and outposts, or upgrade them, and monitor your settlement's and defenses to defeat the monsters and save your human settlement!

potential_items.title: Collision Course
potential_items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 290 篇用户评测中有 73% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: An asteroid is hurtling toward the planet! Sneak, scavenge and blast your way through an immersive prehistoric world filled with Humans, Dinosaurs, Droids and Mother Nature’s fury!

potential_items.title: Alien Market Simulator
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 89 篇用户评测中有 87% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 在你的太空站经营市场。修复并升级太空站，扩展服务，并向各种外星顾客销售商品。体验在太空中管理企业和扩大市场的挑战。

potential_items.title: Anomaly Zone Renovation
potential_items.review_summary: 特别差评 此游戏的 69 篇用户评测中有 13% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: A-Zone Renovation is a continuation of the legendary Zone, combining the classic stalker atmosphere with revised mechanics. A large-scale rebalancing, from weapons to economy, a new role-playing system, an improved interface, PvE and PvP activities - the Zone is ready to grow with its community.

potential_items.title: CYBERMATRIX
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 123 篇用户评测中有 89% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: CYBERMATRIX 是一款快节奏的移动游戏。在这款游戏中，你的动作风格非常重要。

potential_items.title: 群星收割者 Starvester
potential_items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 189 篇用户评测中有 76% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 一款简短的增量游戏，围绕着扩展一个横跨整个恒星系统的工厂，在太空中建造巨型超级结构。部署成群的无人机，开采资源，解锁升级，并收集恒星的能量！

potential_items.title: Trakonius
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 62 篇用户评测中有 87% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: In the merciless sands of the arena, a gladiator is forced to fight for survival. Trakonius defies Mars, the God of War, in this Action Roguelike experience! Face gladiators, mythological creatures, and deadly challenges across four brutal arenas. The truth can only be revealed through combat!

potential_items.title: Shamania
potential_items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 137 篇用户评测中有 75% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 莎玛尼娅》是一款开放世界生存游戏，在游戏中，您将与朋友们共同创作、战斗和探索一个生机勃勃的沙盒世界。扩大您的基地，使其成为生存的枢纽，收集资源，掌握专业技能，从而解锁新的工具和机会！

potential_items.title: 春日狂想曲：情窦初开的秘密
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 58 篇用户评测中有 98% 为好评。
